Plant 1 Baseline: Break between load sheets (load bar start/end) and defect/inspection logs; no universal run ID carried through. (Likely universal problem)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Does Plant N have a run/load identifier that appears on load sheet AND inspection/defect log? What is it called (rack, bar, batch, cart, carrier)?
Normalization Action: Define platform-standard ProductionRun + LoadRecord identifiers; require on inspection/defect/NCR screens.

Plant 1 Baseline: Customer-specific defect lists vary; 'Other (Define Defect)' free-text exists. (Universal pattern; exact lists customer-specific)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Collect all defect terms used on Plant N forms; note any local-only terms. Capture whether free-text buckets exist.
Normalization Action: Standardize to shared DefectType leaf nodes; store original label + map; remove free-text except controlled 'Other' reason.

Plant 1 Baseline: Mixture of Excel templates and scanned paper; some forms record defect locations (cavity codes) rather than counts. (Likely customer-driven, universal in spirit)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Identify if Plant N has scanned/paper inspection logs; whether defect-by-location is required by any customer.
Normalization Action: Support both defect count and defect location capture as child records under InspectionRecord.

Plant 1 Baseline: Load sheet exists; denominator fields not consistently present on defect logs. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Does Plant N capture qty loaded/unloaded/inspected consistently? Where is denominator captured?
Normalization Action: Require QuantityLoaded/Unloaded/Inspected at ProductionRun level; link to InspectionRecord.

Plant 1 Baseline: Large volume of LAB/CHEMISTRY templates; specs recorded. (Plant-specific to e-coat plants)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: If Plant N has e-coat, collect tank list + chemistry parameters + frequency; if not, confirm alternative chemistry (pretreat only, etc.).
Normalization Action: Make LabChemistry entity configurable by LineType (ECOAT vs others).

Plant 1 Baseline: Powder recipe templates and process checklists exist. (Plant-specific to powder plants)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: If Plant N has powder, capture booth/oven parameters and whether they are recorded numerically or check-off.
Normalization Action: ProcessControl parameter catalog must be line-type aware (Powder vs E-Coat).

Plant 1 Baseline: Out-of-spec reaction form exists but not tied to NCR number. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Does Plant N use a reaction plan form? Is it numbered? Does it trigger NCR/CAPA automatically?
Normalization Action: Add system rule: repeated out-of-spec or unclosed reactions auto-create NCR draft with linkage.

Plant 1 Baseline: Disposition captured as columns (Rework/Scrap) rather than standard codes; approval evidence weak. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Collect Plant N disposition logs/fields; list terms used for disposition; check customer approval gates.
Normalization Action: Map local terms to standard DispositionCodes; enforce customer approval workflow where required.

Plant 1 Baseline: GP12 flow and tag needs exist as docs/labels; no per-lot GP12 status tracking. (Customer-driven; likely universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Does Plant N have GP-12 forms/tags? How is GP-12 exit documented? Is it per customer program?
Normalization Action: Model GP-12 as configurable containment profile per customer/part with status per ProductionRun/Lot.

Plant 1 Baseline: Labels exist but lack lot/run linkage. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Gather Plant N labels, cert logs, ship release forms; confirm what identifiers are printed.
Normalization Action: Require lot/run identifier on any ship-release record; link to ProductionRun + Inspection summary.

Plant 1 Baseline: Calibration log exists but inspection forms don’t reference instrument IDs. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Check if Plant N inspection/test forms include gage IDs/cal due dates; collect calibration system evidence.
Normalization Action: Add optional instrument linkage on test result records; support audit export of calibration status.

Plant 1 Baseline: Operator identity commonly captured as initials; no competency link evidence in forms reviewed. (Likely universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Collect Plant N training/qualification forms (if any) and how operators are identified (badge, employee ID).
Normalization Action: Standardize user identity capture (badge scan) and link actions/inspections to TrainingCompetency records.

Plant 1 Baseline: Duplicate '-edit' versions and stale templates present; no enforced obsolescence visible. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Check Plant N for duplicate templates, edit copies, archives in active folders; capture revision evidence fields.
Normalization Action: Centralize templates with DocumentRevision entity; block obsolete revisions in UI.

Comparison Dimension: Data capture medium (Excel vs paper scans)
Plant 1 Baseline: Scanned inspection records exist alongside Excel templates. (Universal risk; volume plant-specific)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Quantify in Plant N: % paper scans vs digital; identify why (customer format, floor constraints).
Normalization Action: Prioritize mobile/tablet floor entry; add scan ingestion only as temporary bridge.

Plant 1 Baseline: E-coat stages and powder equipment appear across forms; need consistent ProcessArea/Equipment lists. (Universal)
Evidence to Collect in Plant N: Collect Plant N equipment names, line stages, and how they appear on forms.
Normalization Action: Normalize reference data for ProcessArea, Equipment; enforce via dropdowns.
